titleStmt.title: SII 23.349: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 349. (A.R. No. 349 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the same wall Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 5: 1017-18 A.D.

summary.p: This is built in at the top and in the middle. It registers a gift of 200 kāśu to the temple by Rudraṉ Arumoḻi alias Prithumahādēviyār queen of Rājarājadēva for the daily feeding of five Brāhmaṇas therein. With this money the temple purchased some lands from two or three private individuals as investment towards this provision.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḻattaraiyar muṭiyum ḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vaitta cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉāramum
ṭalamuḻuvatu māpperunta saripaṉmarāṉa śrīrājentiracoḻa tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu vaṭakarai Irājentriraciṅ
nāṭṭu brahmadeyam vem tāṇṭaccaturveti maṅkalattu tiruvica lūruṭaiya mahādevar koyililey periya
devar nampirāṭṭiyār Urudra deviyār tiruvicalūruṭaiya mahā devar koyililey nicatam Aivar brāhmaṇar cantirāditta
bhūmi koḷḷavum Iṟaikāvaluk ṭṭiṉa kācu Irunūṟu Ivaiccil Ivvūr śrī jaṉanātavatikku kiḻakku Aḻakiyacoḻavāykkālukku teṟkku
ṟṟu patiṉoṉṟāñcaturattu ndakkiramavittaṉiṭai vilaikoṇṭa nilam Araikkāl Itu Ulakaḷantaruḷiṉapaṭiyāl nilam
kkāṇikku vilaiyākak kuṭutta kācu muppattiraṇṭey kāl Ivvūr Irāyūr muḷakka[m śrīkecu]vabhaṭṭan Atiya puruṣottama tecap piriyaṉe
koṇṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūr mipiṭāraṉ caṉanātavatikku kiḻakku Aḻakiya coḻavāykkālukku teṟkku muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñca tirattu tiruveṇkāṭapaṭṭaṉ
pakkal vilaikoṇṭuuṭaiya nilam Oru māvaraiyum kuḻi Iraṇṭe kālum Emappanār Ikkecuvabhaṭṭa Ātitākkiyārpakkal nāṉ peṟṟu Uṭaiya nilam nāṉku māmukkāṇimu
ntirikai Arai muntirikai kuḻi Araikkālum Āka nilam mākāṇi muntirikai mukkāl muntirikaik kuḻi mukkāle mākāṇiyum Itināl Ikkaḷa van=ta mikainilamum Inni
lattakappaṭṭa teṅkum māvum pilāvum puḷiyum maṟṟum palluruvil payaṉ maramum Akappaṭṭa nilam viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭut tukku kiḻpālkke
llai vāmaṉavatikku melkku kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum ceṭṭapocaṉ tāma nappipaṭṭar nilattukku tirumañcuṇaoḻukkukku kiḻakkum Iru tiṟainilattu
1- kaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟkkumāka Inṉaṭuvupaṭṭa nilam paḻampaṭi Ivvaṟu mākāṇi muntirikai kuḻi mukkāle mākāṇiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttu kkoṇṭa nilaṅkaḷukku vilaippo
tevar śrīrājarājatevar ṉampirāṭṭiyār Uruttiraṉ Aru moḻiyāṉa pirutumāhateviyār It tiruvicalūruṭaiya māhā tevar koyillile nicatam Ayvar brāhmaṇar can=tirātittava ṟ Uṇṇa ceytuvarakkāṭṭiṉa kācu Irunūṟu
koḷvatāṉa kācu nūṟu Ikkācu nūṟṟilum Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa nilat tukku kirayatiraviyamāka koṇṭa kācu [5 1000 9 100 4 10] Ikkācu Āvaṇak kaḷiye kaiccella Aṟakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭutteṉ tiruvicalūruṭaiya mahādevar maṭa
caṇṭeyśvaratevaṟkku Irāyūr muḷakkam kecuvapaṭṭa Ātitākkiyār makaṉ puruṣottama tecappiri
Digital edition of SII 23.349 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
